calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause was scheduled for Court Trial Hearing on this day.
This cause was re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Janet Pond.
Nicole Soltanzadeh, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Panya Wongsenakhum and Ratsamee Limdulpaiboon.
Jason Wolford, Esq. for Defendants: Thomas Byrne and Tony McMahon.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendants agreed to pay Plaintiffs $10,500.00 and waived all back rent and per diem damages through April 15, 2006, excluding security deposit and interest, and $1,000.00 relocation fees.
Defendants agreed to vacate in broom cleaned condition on or by 11:59 pm on April 15, 2006. Initial payment of $3,000.00 will be paid today and $3,000 due April 15, 2006, on the date defendants vacate premises. The remaining balance in three payments of $1,500.00 each due on 10/15/06, 4/15/07, and 10/15/07.
Parties waived attorney fees and costs.
If defendants fail to vacate, judgment plus fees and costs for plaintiffs.
Parties agreed to terms in open court. Matter was deemed settled and trial was vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Off Calendar
